hypothesis: Add day-of-week seasonal lag features: for each item, compute the rolling mean of sales on the same weekday over the past 4 and 8 occurrences (lag_7*4=28 days, lag_7*8=56 days worth of same-weekday observations). These capture strong weekly seasonality patterns more directly than generic rolling means, which average across all weekdays. Also add same-weekday lag features: lag_7, lag_14, lag_21, lag_28 already exist; add lag_35 and lag_49 (7-week) for same-weekday pattern. All other settings unchanged from exp_0011 (best so far).
